title: agelanthus fuellebornii
intro: Agelanthus fuellebornii, also known as the "Khat tree," is a plant species native to East Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include pain relief, fever reduction, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Agelanthus fuellebornii include improved mental clarity, increased energy, and enhanced appetite, although it is also known to have potential side effects such as addiction and increased heart rate. Herbal preparations of Agelanthus fuellebornii can be made into a tea or consumed as a raw leaf, often chewed by locals for its stimulant properties.
